description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/cloud-oscilloscope/qtloscope and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. The job executes the commands: make, cp .build/qmloscilloscope .build/libqmqtt.so.1 ./, and cp src/oscilloscope.ini ./ . After the script finishes, it uploads an artifact named oscilloscope containing the files qmloscilloscope, libqmqtt.so.1, and oscilloscope.ini. The pipeline has no additional services, caches, or conditional rules.
